rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN REALTY, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY et al VS. WASHINGTON MUTUAL BANK et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tueday, March 27, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain without leave to amend as to the fourth cause of action, promissory estoppel. Sustain with leave to amend as to the first, second and third causes of action to plead in good faith facts to establish standing existance of contract particularity re fraud. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. ZHI QUAN WU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Peter Chen
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tueday, March 27, 2012, line 4. PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s Motion For Terminating Sanctions Against Peter Chen. Grant termination plus sanctions in the amount of $540.00 per party. Failed to comply with jan. 25, 2012 discovery order and failed to communicate in any matter with moving party. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KAREN TOM et al VS. JANIE VINSON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Quash Service Of Pltf'S Summons
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tueday, March 27, 2012, line 7. DEFENDANTs JANIE VINSON nad QIYANA MARTIN's Motion To Quash Service Of Plaintiff's Summons. Deny Motion to Quash, 37.9(a)(5) issue of fact. CCP 128.5 not available as sanctions remedy, except for cases filed prior to dec. 31, 1994. Defense counsel needs to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C in the future. = (501/REQ)
